creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
Roman Bogorodskiy <novel@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Hi,
>
> Could you please describe how you installed easytag (from port, package,
> etc)? Also, it would be interesting to see output of 'ldd' for easytag.

Yes, I installed it from ports (I reinstalled it today with
portmaster).
